_exam_focus: .mcp.json in the project root = project-scoped config (checked into repo, shared with team)
~/.claude.json = user-scoped config (personal, applies across all projects)
Project config takes precedence over user config for the same server name
Each server entry needs: type, and either 'command'+'args' (local) or 'url' (remote)
allowedTools scopes which tools THIS project can call on the server
_task: Fill in the TODOs below to produce a valid .mcp.json. Then answer the questions.
_questions: Q1: A teammate clones this repo. Which servers will they automatically have? Which won't they have?
Q2: You have a personal 'my-notes' MCP server you want in ALL your projects. Where do you configure it?
Q3: The 'database' server exposes 10 tools but this project should only call 'query' and 'insert'. How do you restrict it?

filesystem._note: Local stdio server — runs as a subprocess. 'command' + 'args' required.

database.command: TODO: fill in the command to start your DB MCP server
allowedTools: TODO: list only the tools this project needs
